prediction.reasoning: The prediction is based on a geometric Brownian motion model, commonly used for stock price forecasting. Historical daily log returns for SYK over the past year (approximately 252 trading days) were used to estimate the average daily drift (mu_daily) and daily volatility (sigma_daily). The point estimate represents the current price compounded by the estimated daily drift over 18 trading days. The confidence intervals are calculated using the estimated daily drift, daily volatility, the square root of the time horizon (18 days), and appropriate Z-scores for each confidence level (50%, 80%, 90%), assuming a log-normal distribution for future prices.
